title: BP Halts Plans to Make Clean Jet Fuel at Spain Plant
content: BPÂ has decided to halt plans to produce clean jet fuel at its Castellon oil refinery in Spain. The decision to pause the biofuel investment was driven by weaker-than-anticipated growth in the market. In February, BP unveiled plans to increase its oil and gas investments and slash spending on renewables, as part of its efforts to boost returns and improve financial performance.
author: Analysts Account
